define.sql:
SELECT 
    `time_id`,
    DATE_ADD(`the_date`, INTERVAL 1 YEAR) AS the_date 
FROM 
    `foodmart_nla`.`time_by_day_dt`
ORDER BY 
    `the_date` DESC
